landing.subheadline: Identify plants, detect diseases, get crop and fertilizer recommendations — all in English, Hindi, and Marathi. Built for Indian farmers.
landing.features_subtitle: From soil to harvest — CropGuard AI covers every step of your farming journey.

features.plant_id_desc: Upload a photo and instantly identify any plant or tree using AI.
features.disease_desc: Detect crop diseases early and get actionable treatment plans.
features.crop_desc: Get crop suggestions based on your soil nutrients and climate.
features.irrigation_desc: Know exactly how much water your crops need and when.
features.weather_desc: Real-time weather data with farming-specific recommendations.
features.chatbot_desc: Ask farming questions in English, Hindi, or Marathi.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to your CropGuard AI account

dashboard.welcome_subtitle: What would you like to do today?
dashboard.no_activity: No activity yet. Start by scanning a plant or getting a crop recommendation.
dashboard.action_scan_desc: Identify plants and detect diseases from a photo.
dashboard.action_crop_desc: Get the best crop for your soil and climate.
dashboard.action_fertilizer_desc: Find the right fertilizer for your crop and soil.
dashboard.action_irrigation_desc: Get water requirements and irrigation schedule.
dashboard.action_chatbot_desc: Ask any farming question in your language.
dashboard.action_market_desc: Check current crop prices in your area.
dashboard.action_reports_desc: Download PDF reports of your past scans.

scanner.title: Plant Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Upload or take a photo of your plant to identify it and detect diseases
scanner.drop_subtitle: or click to browse your files
scanner.api_note: Results are powered by Kindwise AI. If the service is unavailable, our offline model will be used automatically.
scanner.error_file_type: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
scanner.error_file_size: Image is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.

results.plant_healthy_desc: No diseases were detected. Keep up the good farming practices.
results.unsupported_crop_warning: This plant is outside the supported crop dataset. Results from the offline model may not be accurate.

crop.title: Crop Recommendation
crop.subtitle: Enter your soil nutrients and climate conditions to get the best crop recommendation
crop.soil_preset: Quick fill — select your soil type:
crop.empty_state: Fill in your soil and climate data to get a personalized crop recommendation.
crop.tip_1: Use a soil test kit to get accurate N, P, K values
crop.tip_2: Check your local weather station for temperature and rainfall
crop.tip_3: pH between 6.0–7.5 suits most Indian crops

source_badge.local_model_warning: This result was generated by the offline fallback model. Accuracy may be limited for crops outside the PlantVillage dataset (38 crop types supported).

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

fertilizer.title: Fertilizer Recommendation
fertilizer.subtitle: Enter your crop and soil nutrient levels to get the best fertilizer recommendation
fertilizer.crop_hint: Type your crop name or select from suggestions
fertilizer.soil_hint: Values from your soil test report (kg per hectare)
fertilizer.unknown_crop_warning: Your crop was not found in our database. Showing general recommendation based on soil nutrients.
fertilizer.empty_state: Enter your crop name and soil nutrient levels to get a personalized fertilizer recommendation.
fertilizer.tip_1: Use your soil test report for accurate N, P, K values
fertilizer.tip_2: Fertilizer need depends on both crop type and current soil levels
fertilizer.tip_3: Apply fertilizers at the right growth stage for best results

irrigation.title: Irrigation Planning
irrigation.subtitle: Enter your crop, soil type, and weather conditions to get an irrigation schedule
irrigation.unknown_warning: Crop or soil type not found in database. Showing estimate based on similar conditions.
irrigation.empty_state: Enter your crop, soil type, and current weather to get a personalized irrigation schedule.
irrigation.tip_1: Irrigate in the early morning to reduce evaporation losses
irrigation.tip_2: Check soil moisture at 10cm depth before irrigating
irrigation.tip_3: Reduce irrigation during and after rainfall

weather.title: Weather Dashboard
weather.subtitle: Real-time weather with farming advice for your location
weather.search_placeholder: Enter city name (e.g. Nashik, Pune, Delhi)
weather.empty_state: Search for your city to get current weather and farming advice.
weather.data_source: Weather data from Open-Meteo (free, no API key)

chatbot.title: AI Farming Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Ask any farming question in English or Hindi
chatbot.welcome_desc: Ask me anything about crops, diseases, fertilizers, irrigation, or farming practices.
chatbot.input_placeholder: Ask a farming question... (Press Enter to send)
chatbot.powered_by: Powered by Groq Llama 3 · Free tier

market.title: Market Prices
market.subtitle: Current crop prices from Indian agricultural markets
market.no_results: No price records found. Try a different commodity or state.
market.empty_state: Search for a commodity to see current market prices.
market.cached_data: Showing cached data — API currently unavailable

reports.title: My Reports
reports.subtitle: Download PDF reports of your scans and recommendations
reports.summary_desc: Download a full PDF including all scans, crop recommendations, fertilizer and irrigation advice.
reports.download_error: Failed to download PDF. Please try again.
reports.no_scans: No scan reports yet. Scan a plant to generate your first report.
